title: Paul Anthony Lithium Pro 3" USB Wet & Dry Mens Rotary Shaver, Stubble and Beard Trimmer - H5021
availability_text: Only 4 left in stock (more on the way).
features: LITHIUM POWER - The High power, ultra-fast charging lithium-ion battery is ready to use in less than 5 minutes. It is fully charged in around 2 hours, which will provide an extra long 90 minute operation. That is around 30 full shaves. Use any USB 5v DC power source, but 2100mAh recommended.
WET OR DRY USE - With the advanced IPX5 waterproof system, you can open the shaver head to rinse with water for easy cleaning after use, or you can use the shave with shaving foam/gel creams.

3D FLOATING HEADS - The 3 dual track rotary blades has one blade lifting the hair follicle, while the second blade cuts it flush to the skin for the smoothest shave ever. The 3D multi-directional heads flex and follow the contours and curvature of the face for a smooth and precise shave. ERGONOMIC - The full textured rubber grip is designed for maximum comfort with a twist ON/OFF control and modern shaver stand.

STUBBLE TIMMER - The additional interchangeable MonoBlade stubble trimming head with its 10 layers skin protection provide a very close shave to 0.2mm for that close stubble feel, or the double-sided head can be used to add detail to any beard, moustache or sideburns.

BEARD TRIMMER - The adjustable beard trimmer attachment easily clips to the Monoblade head providing 20 different lengths of beard from 0.5mm to 10mm. Combining the shaver with the additional attachments will give unsurpassed performance and the perfect look you need from day to day.
description: Product Description The Paul Anthony 'Lithium Pro 3' is the ultimate in mens shaving performance. The 3D heads will flex and pivot to the contours of your face, while the advanced triple dual track rotary blades, lift and cut every hair follicle for the cleanest and smoothest shave ever. Use dry or wet with your favourite shaving foam or gel. Rinse under the tap. This shaver is waterproof to IPX5. The long-life lithium power battery is quickly charged with any USB power source and would be ready in less than 5 minutes, or 2 hrs for a full charge lasting 90 minute or 30 shaves (approx.). The additional Monoblade stubble shaver/trimmer has 10 layers of skin protection that not only protects from chaffing, but also lifts the hair before being cut to a precise 0.2mm length. It can also be used and a detailing trimmer to shape and style any beards or moustaches or just to clean up your sideburns. The attachment for the Monoblade makes the unit into a beard trimmer, with over 20 different lengths from 0.5mm to 10mm. Each chosen length locks into place. So whether you want the clean shave, stubble or nicely trimmed beard, the Paul Anthony 'LithiumPro 3 ' is for you. It also comes with an anti-slip rubber ergonomic grip that prevents slippage in wet environments and provides ease and stability for consistent movements, a protective shaver cap and a shaver stand. Box includes: 1x Shaver 1x Monoblade Stubble Trimmer 1x Beard Trimmer Attachment 1x Stand 1x USB Charger Cable 5ml Lubricating Oil 1x Cleaning Brush 1x Instruction Manual Directions [Partial] Charge the device, use it for wet or dry shaving, and clean it as needed. Safety Warning Avoid submerging the shaver in water. Be cautious when handling the sharp blades. Always use the provided USB cable for charging. Keep small parts out of reach of children to prevent choking hazard. See more
